title: Toxi's Enhanced Swords: Reforged
description: Adds The Enhanced Sword, A Sword That Can Be Enhanced With Different Items
body:
Toxi's Enhanced Swords: Reforged Is A Remake Of A Mod I Made A Few Years Ago, With Better Textures And Features.

### Casts
Casts Are Obtained By Using Deepslate In A Stonecutter
Casts Are The First Part To Making The Sword, They Are Used To Make Sword Fragments

### Fragments
Fragments Only Come In The 3 Required Fragments
Diamond Hilt Fragment
Gold Blade Fragment
Iron Blade Fragment
You Need All Of Them To Get The Sword

### Enhanced Sword
Once You Get The Enhanced Sword There Are 6 Upgrades
They Are Obtained By Using The Upgrade Item And The Enhanced Sword In A Crafting Table

### Upgrade Items

Nether Star,
Shulker Shell,
Heart Of The Sea,
End Crystal,
Totem Of Undying,
Enchanted Golden Apple
